query: Latest cumulative laboratory-confirmed Ebola (Bundibugyo virus) cases in DRC as of late June 2026, daily new case counts, and ECDC Communicable Disease Threats Report figures for weeks 26-28 2026
answer:
I've completed the research and submitted the structured findings. 

## Summary

**Latest cumulative confirmed cases (DRC):** As of the most recent data (27 June 2026, DRC MoH SitRep N°044, reported 28 June, reflected in ECDC's 29 June update), the DRC has **1,274 confirmed cases and 360 confirmed deaths**, with 502 hospitalised in isolation. The single most recent daily increment was **+47 new confirmed cases and +12 deaths**.

**Daily trajectory:** Growing steadily at roughly **40 new confirmed cases/day** with no clear plateau (344 on 3 Jun → 1,274 on 27 Jun). The +47 latest-day increment is at/above the running average, indicating sustained, slightly accelerating expansion. Now the third-largest Ebola outbreak on record.

**Uganda & EU/EEA:** Uganda at 20 cases/2 deaths (no new cases since 21 June); two imported EU/EEA cases (France 24 June, Germany via US medevac 19 May). Outbreak total ~1,294 cases, ~362 deaths, CFR ~26–28%.

**ECDC CDTR:** Confirmed published **weekly on Fridays**, Friday-to-Friday weeks. **Week 26 (19–26 June 2026)** is the latest available, citing DRC 1,155/304, Uganda 20/2 (data as of 26 June). **Weeks 27 (26 Jun–3 Jul) and 28 (3–10 Jul) are not yet published** as of 29 June 2026 — expected ~3 July and ~10 July respectively.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.snippet: On 28 June, the DRC Ministry of Health reported a total of 1 274 confirmed cases, including 360 confirmed related deaths, and 502 individuals hospitalised in isolation (as of 27 June). 47 new confirmed cases and 12 new deaths in the previous day.

sources.title: 2026 Ebola epidemic - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: 17th Ebola outbreak in DRC, caused by Bundibugyo ebolavirus; PHEIC declared 16 May 2026; 321 confirmed deaths in DRC and 2 in Uganda as of last week of June.

sources.snippet: By 27 June it had grown to 1,294 confirmed cases (1,274 in DRC, 20 in Uganda) and about 362 confirmed deaths, third-largest Ebola outbreak on record.
